title: Feed Discovery
subtitle: Instagram-like entry into live roulette with dealer identity, table state, and watch-first CTA.

title: Watch Mode
subtitle: Expanded table view that preserves dealer context while showing stakes, table state, and instant operator entry.

title: Roulette Gameplay
subtitle: In-table roulette flow with chips, bet map, round history, and a visible win-state settlement.

title: Blackjack Gameplay
subtitle: Decision-heavy blackjack seat flow with cards, action controls, hand summary, and resolved payout state.

title: Baccarat Gameplay
subtitle: Trend-led baccarat screen with side selection, roadmap behavior, and instant result visibility.

title: Dealer Profile
subtitle: Follow-first dealer surface designed to deepen return loops and make tables feel personal, not anonymous.

title: Operator Handoff
subtitle: LC App hands off to the licensed operator for login, KYC, wallet, and final game session ownership.

title: Pilot Insights
subtitle: B2B proof layer showing how feed discovery converts into operator join-rate and revenue logic.
